title: thelypteris pseudoreptans
intro: Thelypteris pseudoreptans, also known as the False Strap Fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris pseudoreptans include the ability to reduce swelling and pain, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris pseudoreptans can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies in various forms, including tinctures and salves.
